title: eryngium alismifolium
intro: Eryngium alismifolium, also known as sea holly, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium alismifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eryngium alismifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
